title: Custom Queries + Service — Job Listing API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Job Listing API with service layer and custom queries.

### Requirements

- `Job` entity: `id` (Long), `title` (String), `company` (String), `location` (String), `salary` (Double), `remote` (Boolean)
- `JobRepository` with custom finders:
  - `findByCompany(String company)` → List<Job>
  - `findByLocation(String location)` → List<Job>
  - `findByRemoteTrue()` → List<Job>
  - `findBySalaryGreaterThanEqual(Double minSalary)` → List<Job>
- `JobService` with CRUD + query methods
- `JobController` at `/api/jobs`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/jobs` → all (200)
- `GET /api/jobs/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/jobs/company/{company}` → by company (200)
- `GET /api/jobs/location/{location}` → by location (200)
- `GET /api/jobs/remote` → remote jobs only (200)
- `GET /api/jobs/salary/{minSalary}` → jobs with salary >= minSalary (200)
- `POST /api/jobs` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/jobs/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/jobs/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
hints: Service layer handles both CRUD and custom query delegation
